L.I.N.K.
LEADER’S INTEGRATION AND NAVIGATION KIT
System of Record  |  OPORD 26-0016
Division-wide  ·  Launched 01 JUN 2026

New recruiter training, rebuilt as a system of record.

3 canvas apps, nearly 20 automated flows, 4 Power BI reports, a SharePoint data layer, and a Palantir/Vantage integration — built by one builder on standard licenses in a government cloud environment.

Every training action date-time stamped. Every record immutable. Training as objective, forensic truth — not checkboxes and memory.
